color_scheme_t(3) Library Functions Manual color_scheme_t(3)

NAME

color_scheme_t - Color scheme definition.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/colorscheme.h>

Data Fields


char name [64]
char description [256]
rgb_pixel_t log_colors_dark [8]
bool has_light_variant
rgb_pixel_t log_colors_light [8]
bool is_builtin
char source_file [4096]

Detailed Description

Color scheme definition.

Defines a color scheme with RGB colors for logging levels. Supports both dark and light mode variants.

Definition at line 62 of file colorscheme.h.

Field Documentation

char color_scheme_t::description[256]

Scheme description

Referenced by colorscheme_export_scheme(), and colorscheme_load_from_file().
